items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario behavior related to anomaly detection on unusual refund patterns. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific outcomes or results from the simulation of this scenario, making it impossible to confirm whether the expected result was achieved. The lack of concrete evidence to support the validation of the scenario behavior leads to an inconclusive status.
